function.content:
---
record_type: invoice
invoice_number: INV-0006
alias: helios_backfill_intake_audit
issued_on: 2025-12-18
total_eur: 520
counterparty: Helios Steuerbüro München GmbH
project: Helios Workflow Sprint
related_entity: Claudia Reiter
lines:
  - item: workflow mapping and intake audit
    quantity: 2
    unit_eur: 260
    line_eur: 520
---
# Helios intake audit invoice

```text
+----------------+--------------------------------+
| field          | value                          |
+----------------+--------------------------------+
| record_type    | invoice                        |
| invoice_number | INV-0006                       |
| alias          | helios_backfill_intake_audit   |
| issued_on      | 2025-12-18                     |
| total_eur      | 520                            |
| counterparty   | Helios Steuerbüro München GmbH |
| project        | Helios Workflow Sprint         |
| related_entity | Claudia Reiter                 |
+----------------+--------------------------------+
```

## Line Items

```text
+---+-----------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
| # | item                              | qty | unit_eur | line_eur |
+---+-----------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
| 1 | workflow mapping and intake audit | 2   | 260      | 520      |
+---+-----------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
|   | TOTAL                             |     |          | 520      |
+---+-----------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
```

## Notes

An older invoice from the first phase when the work was mostly diagnosis and process-mapping.

function.message: Processed the oldest inbox item by adding invoice YAML frontmatter to 50_finance/invoices/2025_12_18__eur_000520__inv_0006__helios_backfill_intake_audit.md and preserving the original note body, then deleted the completed inbox file.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed root bootstrap, inspected 99_system before task work, read nested AGENTS.MD files for 00_inbox, 50_finance, and 50_finance/invoices, used OCR workflow plus finance frontmatter schema, preserved the entire original body below the frontmatter, and deleted the inbox file only after full completion.
function.outcome_justification: The inbox request in 00_inbox/000_next-task.md specifically asked for OCR-style frontmatter on the invoice note. The target file visibly contained all required schema fields and a single line item, so the note could be updated exactly per 99_system/schemas/finance-record-frontmatter.md while preserving the original body verbatim. After completion, deleting the processed inbox file matched the instructions in 99_system/workflows/process-next-inbox-item.md and 00_inbox/AGENTS.MD.
